description: Quran Knowledge HyperGraph — Hyperedge mappings connecting ayahs to referenced entities, themes, and semantic tags

hyperedges.description: Bismillah — Opening invocation establishing Allah's mercy as the gateway to all action
All praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all worlds
You alone we worship, You alone we ask for help — essence of tawheed in worship
Guide us to the straight path
Path of those favored, not of those who earned anger nor of those who went astray
This is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for the God-conscious
Allah tells angels He will place a khalifah (vicegerent) on earth — creation of Adam
Allah taught Adam the names of all things — knowledge granted to humanity
Angels prostrate to Adam; Iblis refuses out of arrogance
Adam and his wife placed in the Garden, warned about the tree
Adam received words of repentance from his Lord, and Allah accepted his repentance
Story of Harut and Marut — angels in Babylon teaching magic as a test
To Allah belongs the east and the west; wherever you turn, there is the Face of Allah
Ibrahim tested by his Lord with commands — made leader of mankind
The Kaaba as a place of return and security; Maqam Ibrahim as a place of prayer
Ibrahim and Ismail raising the foundations of the Kaaba with a prayer for acceptance
Muslims made a middle/just nation, witnesses over humanity; change of qiblah
Turn your face toward al-Masjid al-Haram — the qiblah change to Mecca
Seek help through patience and prayer; Allah is with the patient
Testing through fear, hunger, loss of wealth, lives, and fruits — glad tidings for the patient
Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un — To Allah we belong and to Him we return
Your God is one God — there is no deity except Him, the Most Merciful
Comprehensive definition of righteousness (birr) — belief, charity, prayer, patience
Fasting prescribed for believers as it was prescribed for those before — attaining taqwa
Ramadan is the month the Quran was revealed — guidance for mankind
When My servants ask about Me — I am near, I respond to the caller when he calls
Complete Hajj and Umrah for Allah — detailed pilgrimage rulings
They ask about wine and gambling — sin greater than benefit; early prohibition stage
Guard strictly your prayers, especially the middle prayer; stand before Allah devoutly
Ayat al-Kursi — The Throne Verse describing Allah's absolute sovereignty, knowledge, and power
No compulsion in religion — truth has become clear from error
Parable of spending in Allah's cause — like a grain producing seven ears of 100 grains each
Spend from the good things you have earned — do not give what you yourself would not accept
Those who consume riba (usury) will not stand except as one driven to madness by Satan
The longest ayah — detailed rulings on debt contracts, witnesses, and documentation
To Allah belongs all in the heavens and earth; He holds you accountable for what is in your souls
The Messenger believes in what was revealed to him — belief in Allah, angels, scriptures, messengers
Allah does not burden a soul beyond its capacity — powerful closing dua of Baqarah
Muhkam and mutashabih verses — clear and allegorical; only Allah knows the full interpretation
Beautified for people is the love of desires — women, children, gold, horses, cattle, crops
Say: O Allah, Owner of sovereignty — You give kingship and remove it at will
Allah chose Adam, Nuh, family of Ibrahim, and family of Imran above all creation
Mother of Maryam dedicates her child to Allah's service
Angels say: O Maryam, Allah has chosen you and purified you above the women of all worlds
Angels announce to Maryam a Word from Allah — his name is the Messiah, Isa son of Maryam
Isa's miracles — healing blind and leper, giving life to clay bird, raising dead by Allah's permission
They plotted, and Allah planned — Allah is the best of planners
Call to People of the Book — come to a common word between us: worship Allah alone
In it are clear signs — Maqam Ibrahim; whoever enters it is safe; Hajj is a duty
Hold firmly to the rope of Allah together and do not become divided
You are the best nation produced for mankind — commanding good, forbidding evil, believing in Allah
Race to forgiveness from your Lord and a Paradise as wide as the heavens and earth
Those who spend in ease and hardship, restrain anger, pardon people — Allah loves the doers of good
By mercy from Allah you were lenient with them — consult them, then rely on Allah
Do not think those killed in Allah's cause are dead — they are alive, sustained by their Lord
Every soul shall taste death; you will be paid in full on the Day of Resurrection
In the creation of heavens and earth and alternation of night and day are signs for people of understanding
Those who remember Allah standing, sitting, and lying down, and reflect on creation
O mankind, be conscious of your Lord who created you from a single soul and from it its mate
Detailed inheritance law — shares for children, parents; Allah instructs you concerning your children
Prohibited marriages — list of women forbidden for marriage due to kinship and affinity
Do not consume one another's wealth unjustly; do not kill yourselves — Allah is merciful
Men are caretakers of women by what Allah has given — roles and responsibilities in family
Worship Allah alone, be good to parents, relatives, orphans, neighbors, travelers — comprehensive ethics
Allah commands you to return trusts and to judge between people with justice
Obey Allah, the Messenger, and those in authority; refer disputes to Allah and the Messenger
Do they not reflect upon the Quran? If it were from other than Allah, they would find many contradictions
Be persistently standing firm in justice as witnesses to Allah, even against yourselves
They did not kill him nor crucify him, but it was made to appear so — Isa was raised to Allah
Isa is a messenger of Allah, His Word bestowed on Maryam, and a spirit from Him — do not say 'trinity'
O believers, fulfill your contracts — lawful and unlawful food categories
Today I have completed your religion and perfected My favor — Islam as the chosen religion
Detailed description of wudu (ablution) and tayammum — purification before prayer
Be persistently standing firm for Allah as witnesses in justice; hatred must not prevent you from being just
Story of Adam's two sons — first murder, Habil and Qabil
Whoever kills a soul — as if he killed all mankind; whoever saves one — as if he saved all mankind
The male thief and female thief — cut their hands as recompense; a deterrent from Allah
We revealed the Torah with guidance and light — whoever does not judge by what Allah revealed...
We revealed the Quran confirming previous scriptures — for each a law and a way; compete in goodness
Wine, gambling, idols, divining arrows are an abomination of Satan's work — avoid them
Allah recounts favors to Isa — miracles of speaking in cradle, birds of clay, healing, and Torah/Injil
Allah asks Isa: Did you tell people to take you and your mother as deities? Isa denies
Say: To whom belongs what is in the heavens and earth? Say: To Allah, who prescribed mercy upon Himself
With Him are the keys of the unseen — He knows what is on land and sea, every leaf that falls
Ibrahim shown the kingdom of heavens and earth — his journey to monotheism through star, moon, sun
Ibrahim's argument against his people — Allah raised him in rank
A chain of prophets: Ishaq, Yaqub, Nuh, Dawud, Sulayman, Ayyub, Yusuf, Musa, Harun
Zakariyya, Yahya, Isa, Ilyas — all among the righteous
Ismail, Al-Yasa, Yunus, Lut — all favored above the worlds
Ten commandments of Islam — shirk, parents, killing children, shameful deeds, killing, orphans' wealth
Say: My prayer, my sacrifice, my life, my death are for Allah, Lord of the worlds
We created you, fashioned you, then told angels to prostrate to Adam — Iblis refused
Adam and his wife say: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves — if You do not forgive us, we will be lost
O children of Adam, We have given you clothing to cover and adorn — but the clothing of taqwa is best
Your Lord is Allah who created the heavens and earth in six days, then rose over the Throne
Do not cause corruption on earth after its reformation; call upon Him in fear and hope
Salih and the she-camel of Allah sent to Thamud as a sign
Shu'ayb sent to Madyan — give full measure, do not cause corruption
Musa asks to see Allah; the mountain crumbles; Musa falls unconscious and repents
My mercy encompasses all things — it is for those with taqwa who give zakat and believe
Covenant of Alast — when Allah took from Adam's progeny their testimony: Am I not your Lord?
To Allah belong the Most Beautiful Names — call upon Him by them
Take what is given freely, enjoin what is good, turn away from the ignorant
You did not throw when you threw, but it was Allah who threw — divine intervention at Badr
Distribution of war spoils — one-fifth for Allah, Messenger, relatives, orphans, poor, traveler
When the sacred months have passed — context of treaty violations and conditions for peace
Polytheists are spiritually impure — they shall not approach al-Masjid al-Haram after this year
The number of months with Allah is twelve — four are sacred; do not wrong yourselves therein
The eight categories of zakat recipients — poor, needy, collectors, new Muslims, slaves, debtors, in Allah's cause, travelers
Take from their wealth a charity to purify them — your prayers are a comfort for them
Allah has purchased from the believers their lives in exchange for Paradise
There has come to you a Messenger from among yourselves — grieved by your suffering, caring, merciful
O mankind, there has come to you instruction from your Lord, healing for hearts, guidance, and mercy
Indeed the allies of Allah — no fear upon them nor shall they grieve
Pharaoh drowning — declares belief at point of death; his body preserved as a sign
There is no creature on earth except that its provision is guaranteed by Allah
Nuh's ark — the oven gushes forth water; embark two of each kind, your family, and the believers
Nuh calls to his son to board the ark; the son refuses, seeks refuge on a mountain, and drowns
To Thamud — their brother Salih: worship Allah, He produced you from earth and settled you therein
Ibrahim's angel guests bring news of Ishaq — Ibrahim's wife Sarah laughs in wonder
The destruction of Lut's people — stones of baked clay rained upon them
We relate to you the best of stories through this Quran
Yusuf tells his father about the dream — eleven stars, the sun, and the moon prostrating to him
Yaqub says: Rather your souls have enticed you — beautiful patience, and Allah is the one sought for help
Yusuf preaches tawheed in prison — authority belongs only to Allah; He commands worship of Him alone
The soul commands evil except for those on whom my Lord has mercy — nafs al-ammarah
Yaqub entrusts Binyamin — Allah is the best guardian and most merciful of the merciful
Yaqub says: I complain of my suffering and grief only to Allah — I know from Allah what you do not know
Do not despair of relief from Allah — no one despairs of Allah's mercy except the disbelieving
Yusuf forgives his brothers — no blame upon you today; Allah will forgive you
In their stories is a lesson for people of understanding — the Quran is not fabricated
Those who believe — their hearts find rest in the remembrance of Allah; surely in Allah's remembrance hearts find comfort
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you; but if you deny, My punishment is severe
Parable of a good word like a good tree — firm root, branches reaching the sky, fruit every season
Ibrahim's dua: Make this city secure and keep me and my sons from worshipping idols
Ibrahim's dua: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and from my descendants; accept my supplication
Indeed, it is We who sent down the reminder (Quran), and it is We who will preserve it
When I have fashioned him and breathed into him of My spirit, fall down in prostration to him
If you tried to count Allah's blessings, you could not enumerate them — Allah is Forgiving, Merciful
Your Lord inspired the bee to build hives and eat from fruits — honey as healing for people
Allah commands justice, excellence (ihsan), and giving to relatives; forbids indecency, evil, and transgression
Whoever does righteousness, male or female, while being a believer — We will give them a good life
Invite to the way of your Lord with wisdom and beautiful preaching; argue in the best manner
Glory to He who took His servant on a night journey from al-Masjid al-Haram to al-Masjid al-Aqsa
Your Lord decrees worship Him alone and excellence to parents — do not say 'uff' to them
Do not approach unlawful sexual intercourse — it is an immorality and an evil way
Do not pursue what you have no knowledge of — hearing, sight, and heart will all be questioned
The seven heavens and earth and everything in them glorify Him — there is nothing that does not glorify Him
We have honored the children of Adam and carried them on land and sea and preferred them over much of creation
Establish prayer at the decline of the sun until dark of night, and the Quran at dawn — the Fajr recitation is witnessed
We send down from the Quran that which is a healing and mercy for the believers
If mankind and jinn gathered to produce the like of this Quran, they could not produce its like
The youth of the cave seek refuge — Our Lord, give us mercy and guide our affairs
Do not say about anything: I will do that tomorrow — except with 'if Allah wills' (insha'Allah)
Keep yourself patient with those who call upon their Lord morning and evening; do not let your eyes pass beyond them
Wealth and children are adornment of this life, but lasting good deeds are better in reward with your Lord
Musa and his young companion journey to the junction of two seas to meet Al-Khidr
Musa asks Khidr: May I follow you to learn what you have been taught of right guidance?
They ask about Dhul-Qarnayn — a righteous king who traveled east and west establishing justice
Dhul-Qarnayn builds a barrier against Ya'juj and Ma'juj (Gog and Magog)
If the sea were ink for the words of my Lord, the sea would be exhausted before the words of my Lord
Say: I am a human like you, revealed to me is that your God is one God — worship Him and associate none
Mention in the Book, Maryam — when she withdrew from her family to a place in the east
The angel appears to Maryam: I am a messenger from your Lord to give you a pure son
Isa speaks from the cradle: I am the servant of Allah — He gave me the Scripture and made me a prophet
Mention in the Book, Ismail — he was true to his promise, a messenger and prophet
These are the prophets Allah blessed — from Adam, Nuh, Ibrahim, Israel; when recited to them they prostrated weeping
We have not sent down the Quran upon you to cause you distress
Indeed, I am Allah. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance
Musa's dua: My Lord, expand my chest, ease my task, untie the knot from my tongue
Say: My Lord, increase me in knowledge — dua for seeking knowledge
The heavens and earth were a joined entity and We separated them; We made every living thing from water
Every soul shall taste death; We test you with evil and good as trial, and to Us you will be returned
We said: O fire, be cool and safe for Ibrahim — the fire miracle
Ayyub calls to his Lord: Adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful
Dhun-Nun (Yunus) in the belly of the whale — La ilaha illa Anta, Subhanaka, inni kuntu minadh-dhalimeen
We have not sent you except as a mercy to the worlds
Proclaim to people the Hajj — they will come on foot and on every lean camel
For every nation We made a rite of sacrifice — your God is one God, submit to Him
It is not their meat or blood that reaches Allah — but it is your taqwa that reaches Him
Strive for Allah as He deserves — He named you Muslims; the Messenger is witness over you
Successful indeed are the believers
We created man from an extract of clay — stages of embryonic development
Did you think We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?
The fornicatress and fornicator — lash each one a hundred lashes; let not pity prevent you in Allah's religion
Tell believing men to lower their gaze and guard their modesty — purer for them
Tell believing women to lower their gaze, guard their modesty, and not display adornment except what is apparent
Ayat an-Nur — Allah is the Light of the heavens and earth; parable of the niche, lamp, and olive oil
In houses which Allah has ordered to be raised — He is remembered therein morning and evening
No blame on the blind, lame, or sick — social inclusion and greeting etiquette (As-Salamu Alaykum)
Blessed is He who sent down the Criterion (Furqan) to His servant as a warning to the worlds
The servants of the Most Merciful walk upon earth gently; when the ignorant address them, they say 'Peace'
Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort of eyes and make us leaders of the righteous
Ibrahim says: When I am ill, it is He who cures me
Sulayman inherited from Dawud and was taught the language of birds
Sulayman's letter to Queen of Sheba opens with Bismillah ar-Rahman ar-Raheem
Who responds to the desperate when he calls upon Him and removes hardship?
Seek the home of the Hereafter with what Allah has given you, but do not forget your share of the world
Do people think they will say 'we believe' and not be tested?
Recite what has been revealed of the Book and establish prayer — prayer prevents indecency and wrongdoing
Do not argue with People of the Book except in the best manner — our God and your God is one
Among His signs — He created for you mates from yourselves, placed love and mercy between you
Among His signs — creation of heavens and earth, diversity of languages and colors
We gave Luqman wisdom — be grateful to Allah; whoever is grateful is grateful for himself
Luqman advises his son: O my son, do not associate anything with Allah — shirk is a great injustice
We commanded man concerning his parents — his mother carried him in weakness upon weakness, weaning at two years
Luqman: Establish prayer, enjoin good, forbid evil, be patient over what befalls you
Luqman: Do not turn your cheek in contempt or walk through the earth arrogantly
Five keys of the unseen — the Hour, rain, womb, tomorrow, death — only Allah knows
In the Messenger of Allah there is a beautiful example for those who hope in Allah and the Last Day
Abide in your homes, do not display yourselves — addressing the Prophet's wives (Mothers of Believers)
Comprehensive description of Muslim men and women — submitting, believing, devout, truthful, patient, humble, charitable, fasting, guarding modesty, remembering Allah
Muhammad is not the father of any of your men, but the Messenger of Allah and the Seal of the Prophets
O you who believe, remember Allah with much remembrance
Allah and His angels send blessings upon the Prophet — O believers, send salawat upon him
We offered the trust to heavens, earth, mountains — they refused; man undertook it; he is unjust and ignorant
They made for Sulayman whatever he wished — arches, statues, basins, anchored cooking pots — jinn workers
Only those who have knowledge truly fear Allah among His servants
Ya-Sin — opening of the 'Heart of the Quran'
We placed before and behind them barriers and covered their sight — they do not see
Glory to Him who created all pairs — from what the earth grows, from themselves, and from what they do not know
Peace — a word from a Merciful Lord (Salamun qawlam min Rabbir Raheem)
Who will give life to bones when they are decayed? Say: He who produced them the first time — He knows every creation
His command when He wills a thing is only that He says 'Be' — and it is (Kun fayakun)
Ibrahim's dua: My Lord, grant me a righteous son
Ibrahim tells his son about the dream of sacrifice; the son says: Do as you are commanded — the great trial
We ransomed him with a great sacrifice — the divine substitution of a ram for Ismail
O Dawud, We made you a vicegerent on earth — judge between people with truth, do not follow desire
Are those who know equal to those who do not know? Only people of understanding will remember
Say: O My servants who have believed, fear your Lord — for those who do good in this world is good, and the earth of Allah is spacious
O My servants who have transgressed against themselves, do not despair of Allah's mercy — He forgives all sins
Your Lord says: Call upon Me, I will respond to you — those too arrogant to worship Me will enter Hell humiliated
Repel evil with what is better — then the one between you and whom was enmity becomes a close friend
We will show them Our signs in the horizons and in themselves until it becomes clear that this is the truth
There is nothing like unto Him — He is the All-Hearing, All-Seeing
Their affairs are decided by consultation among themselves — shura
We sent it down on a blessed night — the Night of Decree
We commanded man to be good to parents — mother carries and nurses 30 months; dua at age 40 for gratitude
O you who believe, if you support Allah, He will support you and plant your feet firmly
We have given you a clear conquest (Treaty of Hudaybiyah)
Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; those with him are firm against disbelievers, merciful among themselves; their mark is on their faces from prostration
O believers, if a sinful person brings you a report, investigate — lest you harm a people in ignorance
The believers are but brothers — make reconciliation between your brothers and fear Allah
Do not mock others, do not defame, do not call by offensive nicknames
Avoid suspicion, do not spy, do not backbite — would one of you eat the flesh of his dead brother?
O mankind, We created you from male and female, made you nations and tribes to know one another — the most noble is the most righteous
We are closer to him than his jugular vein — Allah's absolute nearness
I did not create jinn and mankind except to worship Me
Man will not have except what he strives for, and his effort will be seen, then fully rewarded
We have made the Quran easy for remembrance — is there anyone who will remember? (Repeated 4 times)
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? (Repeated 31 times)
Everyone upon the earth will perish, and there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor
The forerunners, the forerunners — those are the ones brought near in Gardens of Pleasure
It is a noble Quran, in a guarded Book — none touch it except the purified
He is the First and the Last, the Manifest and the Hidden — He has knowledge of all things
He created the heavens and earth in six days, rose over the Throne — He is with you wherever you are
Know that worldly life is play, amusement, adornment, boasting, and competition in wealth and children
Allah will raise those who believe and those who have been given knowledge by degrees
What the Messenger gives you, take it; what he forbids you, abstain from it — fear Allah
He is Allah — there is no deity except Him, Knower of the unseen and witnessed, the Most Merciful
He is Allah — the Sovereign, the Holy, the Source of Peace, the Bestower of Security, the Guardian, the Almighty, the Compeller, the Supreme
He is Allah — the Creator, the Originator, the Fashioner; to Him belong the Most Beautiful Names
Allah does not forbid you from being kind and just to those who do not fight you — He loves the just
Allah loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a single solid structure
When the call to prayer on Friday is proclaimed, hasten to the remembrance of Allah and leave trade
O believers, do not let your wealth or children divert you from the remembrance of Allah
Fear Allah as much as you are able, listen, obey, spend — it is better for yourselves
Whoever fears Allah — He will make for him a way out and provide for him from where he does not expect
Whoever relies upon Allah — He is sufficient for him; Allah will accomplish His purpose
O believers, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones
Blessed is He in whose hand is the dominion, and He has power over all things
He who created death and life to test which of you is best in deed
And indeed, you are of a great moral character
I said: Seek forgiveness of your Lord — He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver; He will send rain, give wealth, children, gardens, rivers
Say: It was revealed to me that a group of jinn listened and said: We have heard an amazing Quran
O you wrapped in garments, stand the night in prayer except a little
Read what is easy from the Quran; establish prayer, give zakat, lend Allah a goodly loan
They give food out of love for Him to the poor, orphan, and captive
About what are they asking one another? About the great news (Day of Judgment)
O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous?
O mankind, you are laboring toward your Lord with exertion and will meet Him
Glorify the name of your Lord, the Most High
O reassured soul, return to your Lord well-pleased and pleasing — enter My Paradise
By the soul and He who proportioned it, then inspired it with its wickedness and righteousness
He has succeeded who purifies it, and he has failed who corrupts it
By the morning brightness — your Lord has not forsaken you nor is He displeased
And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied
For indeed, with hardship comes ease (Inna ma'al usri yusra)
We created man in the best form (ahsan taqweem)
Read in the name of your Lord who created — first revelation to the Prophet
We sent it down on the Night of Power
The Night of Power is better than a thousand months
They were commanded only to worship Allah sincerely, establish prayer, and give zakat — the right religion
Whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it; whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it
Indeed mankind is ungrateful to his Lord — and he is a witness to that
Competition for more distracts you — until you visit the graves
By time, indeed mankind is in loss — except those who believe, do good, enjoin truth, and enjoin patience
Woe to every scorner and mocker who collects wealth and counts it — thinking it will make him immortal
Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?
Have you seen the one who denies the religion? He repels the orphan and does not encourage feeding the poor
We have given you al-Kawthar — so pray to your Lord and sacrifice
Say: O disbelievers, I do not worship what you worship — to you your religion, to me mine
When the victory of Allah comes and the conquest — people enter Islam in multitudes
May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined — his wealth and gain will not avail him
Say: He is Allah, the One — the eternal refuge; He neither begets nor is begotten; there is nothing comparable
Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak — from the evil of what He has created, darkness, envy
Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind — from the evil of the retreating whisperer who whispers in hearts
